programmes.show_description: The Poseidon Crew are running out of time to find a 1,000-ounce nugget. The Gold Retrievers work through the night in an attempt to escape dangerous summer heat. S7, Ep16
Alone: Lonely Like The Wolf. In the Bulgarian mountains, wolves and boars stalk all-star survivalist EJ Synder. Alone and without fire, he is an easy target for predators. S1, Ep7
Survive Or Ky Tryin. All-star survivalist Ky struggles in the Amazon rainforest. He faces swarms of mosquitos, blood-thirsty piranhas and caiman-filled waters. S1, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Greek Revival Farmhouse. The team preserves a Greek revival farmhouse in Bentleyville. Main salvage items include mantels, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop. S6, Ep2
Vaughan Furniture Company. The team heads to the Vaughan Furniture Company. Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. S6, Ep3
Tunnel Vision. Shawn gambles on a risky move. Kris suffers a life-threatening air-line freeze up, whilst Zeke attempts the most dangerous dive of his life through 20-ft of ice. S6, Ep13
Three's Company. Sean continues his search for the boulder that marks the gold patch he found last summer. In need of a new plan, Emily asks Sean for permission to dredge the Bluff. S6, Ep14
The Dust Devil's entire operation is forced to shut down as The Poseidon Crew's dig zone floods. Every team is desperate to reach their targets. S5, Ep3
Dwarf Hippo. The Malagasy dwarf hippo has been presumed extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist trek through Madagascar to prove it survives. S2, Ep2
The Hook. Halfway through the King crab gauntlet, the crews must dig deep to get over the midseason hump. The skippers give their youngest deckhands a choice: step up or step off. S8, Ep4
Alien Abduction. Both man and machine are showing signs of wear. The Ramblin' Rose struggles with engine failures, while The Wizard's greenhorn grapples with doubts. S8, Ep5
Wasting Away. Boyce takes a risk crossing a river to reach rich ground, whilst Ben rappels down a cliff. 68 year-old mining veteran John Belcik starts his descent into the Canyon. S1, Ep3
India's Atlantis. Josh travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. He dives into the Arabian Sea to visit a dig site that could rewrite history. S3, Ep16
The Secret. Adventurer and avid explorer, Josh Gates, travels all over America to investigate the mystery of the 1980s bestseller and cult phenomenon, The Secret. S4, Ep1
Mississippi Mayhem. In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. S4, Ep4
High Goals. The Bushmen struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. The Misfits are forced to work Issy's mine Honey Hole as they wait for bulldozer repairs. S6, Ep18
From The Last Hole. The Bushmen bring in a master opal cutter, hoping to transform rough stones into a $100,000 haul. Sofia and Isaac are threatened by a mine roof collapse. S6, Ep19
Lost At Sea. The Coast Guard scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet awaits news on fate of its crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig ponders an early exit. S13, Ep18
Last Damn Arctic Storm. After the Destination tragedy one last storm hits Edgar, Bill, Sean and Jake. The Coast Guard fear the worst for another fishing vessel as it takes on water. S13, Ep19
Under-Mined. Ice sets in early, threatening to freeze the operation. In a desperate search for unfrozen ground, Andy creates a novel solution: digging up the road. S2, Ep11
Blow The Man Down. Mother Nature blows back as Landon embarks on his first solo mission. Sig fishes in 20-foot seas as ferocious tides endanger John's crewmen. S20, Ep11
Shane and Russell take the biggest gamble of their season. Marcus, Linden and Dale desperately need new ground before intense heat shuts down their operation. S7, Ep17
Edge of Madness. Two survivalists take on the hot and hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle against declining health. S2, Ep1
Rumble in the Jungle. Christina and Steve take on the Mexican jungles of Quintana Roo. With each sleepless bug-filled night, tensions rise - will they cope with each other? S2, Ep2

Pickle Mansion. The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. S6, Ep4
Mine Master's House. The team travel to Pennsylvania to reclaim items from an old mine master's house. They are surprised to find much of the house picked over before they arrive. S6, Ep5
Cracked. Kris' scheme to make a fortune on Shawn's Bluff find is sabotaged. Zeke may have found his mining future - until the ice breaks up and he has to move. S6, Ep15
Never Say Die. Shawn must fix his landlocked barge, but faulty controls threaten the Megadredge dream. And with limited dredging supplies, Emily gambles in the hope of a fast payoff. S6, Ep16
The Gold Gypsies make a discovery that could finally catapult their season. Meanwhile, the Victoria Diggers hit red tape, pushing Neville to the edge. S5, Ep4
The Legendary Cape Lion. Forrest returns to his childhood home in Zimbabwe searching for the extinct Cape lion after numerous sightings of a similar size lion with a black mane. S2, Ep3
Vital Sounds. The crew of the Wizard face a life-or-death situation when a deckhand collapses. On the Seabrooke, Scott is determined to win the captain's wager - but at what cost? S8, Ep6
I Don't Wanna Die. In a rush to help their collapsed greenhorn, the Wizard crew calls in a Coast Guard helicopter, and the remaining fleet race to haul crab ahead of the hurricane. S8, Ep7
Big Risk Big Reward. John's plans are derailed when a tree crushes his shelter. Ben finds the best dig site he's ever seen and Boyce's only shot at gold leaves him with dire options. S1, Ep4
Mystery Of Dead Mountain. In Siberia, Josh Gates investigates the strange and brutal cold case of the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously in 1959. S6, Ep1
Siberia's Coldest Case. Josh Gates faces harsh conditions whilst investigating the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine hikers died in unexplained circumstances. S6, Ep18
Paradise In Peril. In Hawaii, the Raneys rescue a young family with a crumbling cabin on a homestead infested by slugs carrying a brain-eating parasite. S4, Ep5
The Lucky Day. Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant. S6, Ep20
New Terra. The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt. S7, Ep1
Battle Lines. When Sig rejects Jake's partnership offer, it sparks an intense feud between the pair. Plus, Josh Harris works hard to prove himself as captain of his father's boat. S14, Ep1
Pontoon Boat Cabin. The crew helps Jedi turn a pontoon boat into a 'cabinboat,' complete with a deck, bathroom and bedroom. This floating build is packed with surprises. S15, Ep7
Small Town, Big Dreams. In West Virginia, the crew play a big part of a small town's post-flood revival as they build a log cabin and timber frame. S15, Ep7
